description_long: This object consists of two traffic cones, one larger and teal with a hexagonal base, and one smaller and orange with a square base. The teal cone features three wide, horizontal, lighter teal reflective stripes and a solid, slightly pointed top. The orange cone has three white reflective stripes and a flat, truncated tip. Both cones have broad, stable bases with visible bolt-like details at the corners, suggesting added stability. The surfaces appear matte with a slightly grippy texture, typical of rubber or plastic traffic cones. No logos, text, or additional markings are visible, and both cones appear new and clean.
description: A pair of new, clean traffic cones—one teal with a hexagonal base and one orange with a square base—each featuring multiple reflective stripes and sturdy, stable bases.
description_view_0: Front view showing the teal cone's hexagonal base and the orange cone's square base, both with visible reflective stripes.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the teal cone's height and the orange cone's flat tip and bolt-like base details.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the orange cone's three white stripes and the teal cone's pointed tip and layered base.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the teal cone's back and the orange cone partially obscured, with both bases visible.
attribute_reflective_stripes: Both cones have three wide, horizontal reflective stripes; the teal cone's stripes are lighter teal, and the orange cone's stripes are white. The stripes are evenly spaced along the upper half of each cone.
attribute_tip_design: The teal cone has a solid, slightly pointed tip in teal, while the orange cone has a flat, truncated tip in orange. Both tips are solid with no attachments.
attribute_base_design: The teal cone has a thick, hexagonal base with layered structure for stability, while the orange cone has a square base with visible bolt-like details at the corners. Both bases appear sturdy and designed to prevent tipping.
attribute_presence_of_logos_or_markings: No logos, text, or other markings are visible on either cone.
attribute_condition: Both cones appear new, clean, and free of visible wear, fading, cracks, or damage.
